title: Data-Intensive Scientific Machine Learning and AI for Science, Engineering, and Medicine
eligibility: Eligible applicants include domestic universities and colleges, national laboratories, non-profit organizations, and for-profit entities. Applications from minority-serving institutions and historically Black colleges and universities are strongly encouraged.
description: This FOA supports research in data-intensive scientific machine learning and artificial intelligence for science, engineering, and medicine. Projects should focus on the development of novel deep learning and neural network methods applied to large-scale scientific datasets. Topics include: computational physics simulations, climate modeling, materials science, genomics, drug discovery, and health informatics. Collaborative, multi-institutional teams are encouraged. Award duration: 3 years.
